# Perl regular expressions for paths that are to be ignored.
(?:^|/)\.gitmodules$
(?:^|/)go\.mod$
(?:^|/)go\.sum$

# configuration for check-spelling itself
^\.github/actions/spelling/

# dependabot configuration has lots of URLs and other non-spell-checkable things.
^\.github/dependabot\.yml$

# CRDs are generated by controller-gen.
# They can have "word\nword" sequences, and "nword" is not in the dictionary.
/crd.yaml$
